metadata.name: Create a Virtual Kit (Bill of Materials)

description: A marketing team wants to sell a new product bundle online. An inventory analyst must create a virtual kit in the system so that when the kit is sold, the system allocates the component inventory.

nodes.task_description: Create a new SKU for the product bundle (the 'parent' item).

expected_outcome.value: A new product SKU is created.

nodes.task_description: Define a Bill of Materials (BOM) for the new parent SKU, linking it to the component SKUs and their required quantities.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully defines the relationship between the parent kit and its children components.

nodes.task_description: Activate the kit. Now, when an order for the parent SKU is placed, the system will automatically check and reserve inventory for the component SKUs.

expected_outcome.value: The virtual kit is now live and sellable.
